subcodes.first_line: O thou ancient friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Though for some time I have not found opportunity to write thee a letter, yet in all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم عبدالبهاء هر چند چندی فرصت نگارش نامه بشما نیافتم ولی در جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
